calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion To Vacate The Renewal Of Judgment Entered On October 5, 2015
Off Calendar Dec-11-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Yolanda Johnson telephone number 415-525-0029 Defendant in Propria Persona.

No other appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person. The Court confirmed its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT YOLANDA JOHNSON'S Motion To Vacate The Renewal Of Judgment Entered On October 5, 2015 is granted. Invalid service of the summons and complaint provides a basis for a court to grant a motion to vacate a renewed judgment. (Fidelity Creditor Services, Inc. v. Browne (2001) 89 Cal.App.4th 195, 203.) Defendant's declaration that she was 5 feet 2 inches tall and weighed 240 pounds at the time of the alleged personal service satisfies her burden that plaintiff's process server did not in fact personally serve defendant. (Johnson Declaration 3.) A motion to vacate the renewal of a judgment is not governed by the time limitations for motions to set aside a default or default judgment. (Fidelity Creditor Services, Inc. 89 Cal.App.4th at 203-204.) Furthermore, the judgment debtor's actual knowledge of the default judgment against her does not govern the timeliness of her motion to vacate the renewal of the judgment on ground of defective service of process in the initial action. Order signed in open Court.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR # 7489. (302/HK)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-07-2005 Dismissal Or Judgment On File As To All Defendants
